title: Ginger Blossom Bliss
description: A floral, silky post-workout dish featuring ground ginger for a unique Brazilian twist.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add ground ginger and salt to the heated oil. Cook for about 2 minutes or until fragrant but not browned.
Gradually add milk, stirring continuously to avoid lumps, while gradually adding lemon juice and honey/maple syrup.
Simmer on low heat for an additional 5-7 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Remove from heat. Stir in vanilla extract just before serving. Serve immediately for best texture.
Optional: Garnish with fresh mint leaves or a drizzle of honey.
